en.title: Enterprise and industrial platforms
en.summary: Business platforms for manufacturing, warehouse operations, and internal teams, covering workflows, data entry, approvals, and operational screens.
en.contribution: Role-aware workflows and traceable operational records.

es.title: Plataformas empresariales e industriales
es.summary: Plataformas para manufactura, operaciones de almacén y equipos internos, con flujos, captura de datos, aprobaciones y pantallas operativas.

pt.title: Plataformas empresariais e industriais

en.title: APIs and system integration
en.summary: Services that move business data between ERP, SAP, banking, tax, pricing, mapping, and legacy platforms while keeping integration boundaries isolated and traceable.

es.title: APIs e integración de sistemas
es.summary: Servicios que mueven datos entre ERP, SAP, bancos, impuestos, precios, mapas y plataformas heredadas, manteniendo límites aislados y trazables.

pt.summary: Serviços que movimentam dados entre ERP, SAP, bancos, impostos, preços, mapas e plataformas legadas, mantendo limites isolados e rastreáveis.

en.title: Real-time and IoT systems
en.summary: Telemetry and GPS solutions for equipment monitoring, fleet tracking, alerts, and historical analysis using maps and time-series data.
